state.output:
<file>
00001| import { createConfig as createPrivyConfig } from '@privy-io/wagmi'
00002| import { createConfig as createWagmiConfig } from 'wagmi'
00003| import { http } from 'wagmi'
00004| import { injected } from 'wagmi/connectors'
00005| import { farcasterMiniApp as miniAppConnector } from '@farcaster/miniapp-wagmi-connector'
00006| import { 
00007|   supportedChains, 
00008|   base, 
00009|   baseSepolia, 
00010|   getRpcUrl, 
00011|   bsc, 
00012|   arbitrum, 
00013|   berachain, 
00014|   avalanche, 
00015|   hyperliquid, 
00016|   polygon, 
00017|   optimism, 
00018|   linea, 
00019|   mantle, 
00020|   unichain, 
00021|   shape, 
00022|   scroll, 
00023|   ethereum,
00024|   plume
00025| } from './chains'
00026| import { config } from '../../config'
00027| 
00028| const transports = {
00029|   [base.id]: http(getRpcUrl(base.id)),
00030|   [baseSepolia.id]: http(getRpcUrl(baseSepolia.id)),
00031|   [ethereum.id]: http(getRpcUrl(ethereum.id)),
00032|   [bsc.id]: http(getRpcUrl(bsc.id)),
00033|   [arbitrum.id]: http(getRpcUrl(arbitrum.id)),
00034|   [berachain.id]: http(getRpcUrl(berachain.id)),
00035|   [avalanche.id]: http(getRpcUrl(avalanche.id)),
00036|   [hyperliquid.id]: http(getRpcUrl(hyperliquid.id)),
00037|   [polygon.id]: http(getRpcUrl(polygon.id)),
00038|   [optimism.id]: http(getRpcUrl(optimism.id)),
00039|   [linea.id]: http(getRpcUrl(linea.id)),
00040|   [scroll.id]: http(getRpcUrl(scroll.id)),
00041|   [mantle.id]: http(getRpcUrl(mantle.id)),
00042|   [unichain.id]: http(getRpcUrl(unichain.id)),
00043|   [shape.id]: http(getRpcUrl(shape.id)),
00044|   [plume.id]: http(getRpcUrl(plume.id)),
00045| }
00046| 
00047| // Dynamically choose config: Privy when available, otherwise InjectedConnector fallback
00048| export const wagmiConfig = config.privy.appId && config.privy.clientId
00049|   ? createPrivyConfig({
00050|       chains: supportedChains,
00051|       transports,
00052|     })
00053|   : createWagmiConfig({
00054|       chains: supportedChains,
00055|       connectors: [injected(), miniAppConnector()],
00056|       transports,
00057|     })
00058| 
00059| export { 
00060|   supportedChains, 
00061|   base, 
00062|   baseSepolia, 
00063|   bsc, 
00064|   arbitrum, 
00065|   berachain, 
00066|   avalanche, 
00067|   hyperliquid, 
00068|   polygon, 
00069|   optimism, 
00070|   linea, 
00071|   mantle, 
00072|   unichain, 
00073|   shape, 
00074|   scroll,
00075|   ethereum,
00076|   plume
00077| } 
</file>

import { createConfig as createPrivyConfig } from '@privy-io/wagmi'
import { createConfig as createWagmiConfig } from 'wagmi'
import { http } from 'wagmi'
import { injected } from 'wagmi/connectors'
import { farcasterMiniApp as miniAppConnector } from '@farcaster/miniapp-wagmi-connector'
import {

  base,
